title: Skill
description: A walkable skill in the Capability pillar's skill registry (agency/skill.py + agency/capabilities/skills/_main.py; Spec 081 + Spec 153 Slice 6 workflow-spine coverage). Links HAS_PHASE→Phase; the registry exposes it via capability_skills_find.

kind.description: Skill class: 'usage' for auto-derived capability-usage walks; 'discipline' for hand-authored multi-phase workflow skills.
